hooks.command: echo "🏢 Virtual Company v1.3.1 Initialized. All Experts and Agents online."
echo "🪄 Running auto-refinement pass..." && (bun run lint || echo "⚠️ Linting check skipped: No linter found or check failed.")

if grep -qE '([^a-zA-Z0-9_-]|^)(AIza[0-9A-Za-z-_]{35}|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{48}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|[0-9a-f]{32})' /dev/stdin; then echo "❌ [Security Sentinel] Potential secret detected in edit buffer. Aborting tool call."; exit 2; fi

hooks.prompt: The context is about to be compacted. Summarize the current progress of the task in one concise sentence to ensure we don't lose track of our immediate objective. Focus on what was just done and what remains.
